title: McManure
description: Minecraft needs more poop! Adds manure from animals that can be used for fertilizer.
body:
McManure
--------

Y'know what Minecraft needs? More poop.

![A cow standing by some poop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9fa958abf3b76ada7f238927b219f32a98b9c6d_0.webp)

Adds manure.  Horses, Donkeys, Camels, Sheep, Pigs, and Chickens all have a chance of (ahem) 
depositing manure.

![A pig with two piles of manure in the foreground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1914725375b023b7d345b372c650ca4ef7d826d7.png)

The manure is a good fertiliser, working just like bonemeal, just not quite as effective.

![Minecraft smelting menu with manure being smelted into dried manure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b30563e83ceed50659f721ba98d4484950b0f0d5_0.webp)
![Nine dried manure objects being crafted into a dried manure block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0754e108634640dbbcb85c29d21f77b0aa8247e2_0.webp)

Manure can be smelted into dried manure.  Nine dried manure can be made into a manure block, which can be burned for fuel. ...or you could build a house out of poo.

![A sunset scene with several blocks of dried manure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d6f0bed4731041ebe71a08bc930157f589962b7_0.webp)
